# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { verify } from 'jsonwebtoken'; // Import necessary libraries 
const JWT_SECRET = process.env['JWT_SECRET'] || "default-secret";   /* Define a secret key for json web token */
export default function (req, res) {    /* Create middleware as an async fn in Nextjs syntax*/    
  try{                                                         // Start of the attempt block                           
      const authCookie = req.headers['authorization'];           // Get Auth Token from headers or cookies                
                                                                  
        if (!authCookie) {                                     /* Check for presence and validity token */                  
          res                  .status(401).json({message:'UnAuthorized'});  // Return Unauthenticated response             
            return;                                              
      }    else{                                                /* If found, continue to the next middleware (verify)*/                     
        const authToken = authCookie.split(" ")[1];                   /** Split 'Bearer' token from header */  // Get only JWT portion                            
         if (!authToken || !authToken.length > 50 ) {                  /* Check for length and validity of Bearertoken*/   
          res                 .status(401).json({message:'UnAuthorized'});   /** Return Unauthenticated response */  // If not valid return unathorised               
            } else{                                                      /* if the token is verified successfully, proceed to next middleware. (decode and check user)*/   
              verify(authToken,'JWT_SECRET', function(err, decoded){       /** Verify Jwt using secret key */  // Decode jwtoken                        
                  if(!decoded || err ){                                    /* Return a response based on the authentication status. (user not authenticated)*/   
                      res                .status(401).json({message:'UnAuthorized'});     /** Response: If User is unauthenticate */       //  UnAuthorised Access     
                  return;                                                // End of successful response                    
              } else {                                                       /* Successful user Authentication. Continue to handler*/   
                 req['user'] = decoded                                        /// Set the authenticated 'User' in request object     },                                                                                                   }) ;  /** Handler: Next middleware */   ));                          // End of next Middle ware and response handling                   };                                     });                             catch (e) { console.error(`Verification failed due to ${err} with token  ${{authToken}} `)};
